testcase.name: test_live_chat_multiline_labeled_prompt

failure.message:
AssertionError: citation[0].section null — grouping failed. c0={'act': 'Act/Standard:', 'section': None, 'note': None}, all cits=[{'act': 'Act/Standard:', 'section': None, 'note': None}, {'act': 'Income Tax Act, 1961', 'section': None, 'note': None}, {'act': 'Section/Para:', 'section': None, 'note': None}, {'act': 'Section 44AD', 'section': None, 'note': None}, {'act': 'Note:', 'section': None, 'note': None}, {'act': 'Presumptive taxation scheme for small businesses with turnover up to ₹2 crore; presumes profit at 8%/6% of turnover with exemption from books and audit.', 'section': None, 'note': None}], content_tail='isions apply

**Lock-in:** If you opt out once, you **cannot re-enter** 44AD for the **next 5 assessment years**. This is the penalty for breaking the presumption.

## Example

**Facts:**
- Turnover: ₹1,80,00,000
- Digital receipts: ₹1,50,00,000
- Cash receipts: ₹30,00,000

**Computation:**
- Profit on digital receipts = ₹1,50,00,000 × 8% = ₹12,00,000
- Profit on cash receipts = ₹30,00,000 × 6% = ₹1,80,000
- **Total deemed profit = ₹13,80,000**

This ₹13.8 lakh is your taxable business income. You cannot claim any actual expenses against it.

---

## SOURCES

**Act/Standard:**
Income Tax Act, 1961

**Section/Para:**
Section 44AD

**Note:**
Presumptive taxation scheme for small businesses with turnover up to ₹2 crore; presumes profit at 8%/6% of turnover with exemption from books and audit.' assert None + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdab4bde5440>('section') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdab4bde5440> = {'act': 'Act/Standard:', 'section': None, 'note': None}.get

testcase.failure:
tests/test_phase3_fixes.py:294: in test_live_chat_multiline_labeled_prompt assert c0.get("section"), \ E AssertionError: citation[0].section null — grouping failed. c0={'act': 'Act/Standard:', 'section': None, 'note': None}, all cits=[{'act': 'Act/Standard:', 'section': None, 'note': None}, {'act': 'Income Tax Act, 1961', 'section': None, 'note': None}, {'act': 'Section/Para:', 'section': None, 'note': None}, {'act': 'Section 44AD', 'section': None, 'note': None}, {'act': 'Note:', 'section': None, 'note': None}, {'act': 'Presumptive taxation scheme for small businesses with turnover up to ₹2 crore; presumes profit at 8%/6% of turnover with exemption from books and audit.', 'section': None, 'note': None}], content_tail='isions apply

**Lock-in:** If you opt out once, you **cannot re-enter** 44AD for the **next 5 assessment years**. This is the penalty for breaking the presumption.

## Example

**Facts:**
- Turnover: ₹1,80,00,000
- Digital receipts: ₹1,50,00,000
- Cash receipts: ₹30,00,000

**Computation:**
- Profit on digital receipts = ₹1,50,00,000 × 8% = ₹12,00,000
- Profit on cash receipts = ₹30,00,000 × 6% = ₹1,80,000
- **Total deemed profit = ₹13,80,000**

This ₹13.8 lakh is your taxable business income. You cannot claim any actual expenses against it.

---

## SOURCES

**Act/Standard:**
Income Tax Act, 1961

**Section/Para:**
Section 44AD

**Note:**
Presumptive taxation scheme for small businesses with turnover up to ₹2 crore; presumes profit at 8%/6% of turnover with exemption from books and audit.' E assert None E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdab4bde5440>('section') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfdab4bde5440> = {'act': 'Act/Standard:', 'section': None, 'note': None}.get
